name: Lightning Bolt
components: M (a bit of fur and a crystal rod)
description: A stroke of lightning forming a 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line blasts out from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the Line makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. When using a higher-level spell slot, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3.
